canonical_definition: A model merging scheme that combines fine-tuned models by adding scaled differences from a base LLM: θLLM + Σ αt(θt − θLLM).
papers: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching
Parameter-Efficient Multi-Task Model Fusion with Partial Linearization

definitions.text: A model merging scheme that combines fine-tuned models by adding scaled differences from a base LLM: θLLM + Σ αt(θt − θLLM).
definitions.paper: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching

definitions.text: A model fusion procedure that combines task-specific parameter vectors by arithmetic operations to build a multi-task model.
definitions.paper: Parameter-Efficient Multi-Task Model Fusion with Partial Linearization

characterization: A model merging scheme that combines fine-tuned models by adding scaled differences from a base LLM: θLLM + Σ αt(θt − θLLM).

iclr24: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching
Parameter-Efficient Multi-Task Model Fusion with Partial Linearization
